description: Phase 1 (DB-backed): mapDbSalesOrderToViewModel builds the correct model from a seeded SO — line amounts, subtotal/total, product names, customer name+address
Phase 1 (DB-backed guard): SO not found and SO with no lines are handled without throwing / without producing a broken document
Phase 1: standard SO confirmation AST evaluates against a sample view model and renders non-empty HTML without throwing (render smoke)
Phase 1 (DB-backed): getSalesOrderHtml for a seeded SO produces HTML containing the order number, a product name, and the formatted total
Phase 1 (DB-backed): generatePDF({ salesOrderId }) returns a non-empty PDF buffer
Phase 1: downloadSalesOrderPDF is denied without inventory/sales-order read permission
Phase 2: resolveDocumentTemplateAst precedence — client override > tenant default > standard fallback
Phase 2 (DB-backed): generic action round-trip — save/list/setDefault/delete scoped by document_type (no cross-type bleed)
Phase 2: resolveDesignerDocumentKind returns 'sales-order' for SO bindings
